records.ety: [L. denotare; de- + notare to mark, nota mark, sign, note: cf. F. dnoter. See Note.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Denoted; p. pr. & vb. n. Denoting.]

defs: To mark out plainly; to signify by a visible sign; to serve as the sign or name of; to indicate; to point out; as, the hands of the clock denote the hour.
quotes: The better to denote her to the doctor.

defs: To be the sign of; to betoken; to signify; to mean.
quotes: A general expression to denote wickedness of every sort.
